name: Shouldn't have abused your power as policewomen, bitch
description:
Abuse of authority gone wrong, gone sexual

As the long title says, YOU have been cuffed, sadly, they kind of found you guilty but since your brain is huge you managed to drag both of them down with you. No longer Officer Trixie (The braixen, for 'sexually looking at you') and Riley (The lucario, for 'destroying your car and your face with her bare fist') are now with your ass! I love Pokemon, again!
